station_address: Survey No 589A, 5V55+W9C Colony Sqaure Building, Pahadi Rd, Aarey Milk Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065
text:
I got directions to the IndianOil Petrol Pump in Goregaon about a week ago, and the experience was excellent.
The location was easy to find, with clear signage and smooth entry/exit access from the main road. The station was well-organized, and vehicle flow was managed efficiently even during busy hours.
Staff members were courteous and quick with service. Fuel filling was transparent, and they ensured proper meter readings. Digital payment options were available and processed without any issues.
The premises were clean and properly maintained, including the air and water facilities. Safety protocols were clearly being followed.
Overall, a very smooth and reliable experience. Highly recommended for quick and hassle-free service.

station_address: Survey No 589A, 5V55+W9C Colony Sqaure Building, Pahadi Rd, Aarey Milk Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065
text:
Very rude behaviour of the refueling staff.
Since I am a local I regularly refuel my two four wheelers and one two wheeler at this pump
One day the staff inspite of openning the fuel lid very rudely asked me to open the cap myself
It was a Suzuki Access and easily pump staff can open the cap as it is at the tail side
Very Rude
Thinking of avoiding this pump from next time

station_address: Survey No 589A, 5V55+W9C Colony Sqaure Building, Pahadi Rd, Aarey Milk Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065
text:
This fuel pump is the most easily accessible for anybody given that its located on the service road just besides Hub Mall. The fuel pump also has a UPI payment facility in addition to card and cash. The staff is really good and they are supportive.

There is also a Kotak bank ATM in the fuel station in case somebody wants to withdraw money.  There is also a tyre air pressure machine which can help you in refilling tyre airs.

The overall quality and the infrastructure of the petrol pump is very well maintained and it is my go to petrol pump since it is just a walk away from my building.

Would rate this place 10/10.

station_address: Survey No 589A, 5V55+W9C Colony Sqaure Building, Pahadi Rd, Aarey Milk Colony, Goregaon East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400065
text:
The service providers charge each person a round figure higher amount.
Even if they take an excess of 20 paise per person, how much extra income are they earning above the actual income.
For example, if they are refueling even 100 cars per day , then 1000×0.20 = 200
Please calculate accordingly to the number of cars , cabs, autos per day .
Can't even imagine how much amount in excess !!
Is there anyone else who has noticed this ?
